name: Mealie
description: Mealie is a self-hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a beautiful web interface. Import recipes from URLs, organize your collection, plan meals, and generate shopping lists. Features user management, API access, and mobile-friendly design.

paths.name: App Data
paths.description: Mealie application data, database, uploaded images, and configuration.

variables.name: Base URL
variables.description: The URL where Mealie is accessed. Change to your actual domain/IP if using reverse proxy.

variables.name: Allow Signup
variables.description: Allow new user registrations. Set to false to disable public signup after creating your account.

variables.name: Default Group
variables.description: Default group name for new users.

variables.name: Default Email
variables.description: Default admin email for initial setup.

variables.name: Default Password
variables.description: Default admin password for initial setup. Change immediately after first login!

variables.name: Max Workers
variables.description: Number of background workers. Increase for faster recipe imports if you have CPU resources.
